title: Submerged heat pipe condenser
abstract: A heat exchange system is disclosed for use with a heat exchanger and a volume of fluid. The heat exchange system may include a tank configured to hold the volume of fluid and having a passthrough. The heat exchange system may also include a heat pipe having an external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and an internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the passthrough. The heat pipe may include a sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS That which is claimed is: 1. A heat exchange system for use with a heat exchanger and a volume of fluid, the heat exchange system comprising: a tank configured to hold the volume of fluid and having a passthrough; and a heat pipe having an external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and an internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the passthrough, wherein the heat pipe comprises a sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank. 2. The heat exchange system of claim 1. further comprising: a second heat pipe, wherein the tank has a second passthrough, wherein the second heat pipe has a second external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and a second internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the second passthrough, wherein the second heat pipe comprises a second sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank. 3. The heat exchange system of claim 2, wherein the internal portion of the heat pipe has a first shape, and wherein the second internal portion of the second heat pipe has a second shape that is different from the first shape. 4. The heat exchange system of claim 1, wherein the heat pipe comprises: a sealed outer metal jacket having a first end, a second end, an outer surface and an inner surface; a vapor cavity; and a wick disposed on the inner surface of the sealed outer metal jacket between the inner surface and the vapor cavity. 5. The heat exchange system of claim 4, wherein the sealed outer metal jacket comprises copper, and wherein the wick is impregnated with water. 6. A heat exchange system for use with a volume of fluid, the heat exchange system comprising: a heat exchanger; a tank configured to hold the volume of fluid and having a passthrough; and a heat pipe having an external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and an internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the passthrough, wherein the heat pipe comprises a sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank. 7. The heat exchange system of claim 6. further comprising: a second heat pipe, wherein the tank has a second passthrough, wherein the second heat pipe has a second external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and a second internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the second passthrough, wherein the second heat pipe comprises a second sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank. 8. The heat exchange system of claim 7, wherein the internal portion of the heat pipe has a first shape, and wherein the second internal portion of the second heat pipe has a second shape that is different from the first shape. 9. The heat exchange system of claim 6, wherein the heat pipe comprises: 

 a sealed outer metal jacket having a first end, a second end, an outer surface and an inner surface; a vapor cavity; and a wick disposed on the inner surface of the sealed outer metal jacket between the inner surface and the vapor cavity. 10. The heat exchange system of claim 9, wherein the sealed outer metal jacket comprises copper, and wherein the wick is impregnated with water. 11. The heat exchange system of claim 6, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a gas- fired burner configured to heat the external portion of the heat pipe. 12. The heat exchange system of claim 6, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a condenser coil configured to heat the external portion of the heat pipe. 13. The heat exchange system of claim 6, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a condenser coil configured to extract heat from the external portion of the heat pipe. 14. A method of exchanging heat with a volume of fluid, the method comprising: holding, within a tank having a passthrough, the volume of fluid; and performing, via a heat pipe having an external portion configured to engage with a heat exchanger and an internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via the passthrough, one of conducting heat from the volume of fluid within the tank to a heat exchanger or conducting heat from the heat exchanger to the fluid within the tank via the passthrough. 15. The method of claim 14, further comprising: conducting heat, via a second heat pipe, from the volume of fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or conducting heat form the heat exchanger to the volume of fluid within the tank. 

 wherein the second pipe has a second external portion configured to engage with the heat exchanger and a second internal portion configured to be disposed within the tank via a second passthrough, and wherein the second heat pipe comprises a second sealed tube configured to conduct heat from the volume of the fluid within the tank to the heat exchanger or to conduct heat from the heat exchanger to the volume of the fluid within the tank. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the internal portion of the heat pipe has a first shape, and wherein the second internal portion of the second heat pipe has a second shape that is different from the first shape. 17. The method of claim 14, wherein the heat pipe comprises: a sealed outer metal jacket having a first end, a second end, an outer surface and an inner surface; a vapor cavity; and a wick disposed on the inner surface of the sealed outer metal jacket between the inner surface and the vapor cavity'. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein the sealed outer metal jacket comprises copper, and wherein the wick is impregnated with water. 19. The method of claim 14, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a gas-fired burner configured to heat the external portion of the heat pipe. 20. The method of claim 14, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a condenser coil configured to heat the external portion of the heat pipe. 21. The method of claim 14, wherein the heat exchanger comprises a condenser coil configured to extract heat from the external portion of the heat pipe.
